name: Texas Style Barbecue on a Bun
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Firm tofu, frozen, thawed - and shredded
2 tbsp Kitchen Bouquet (or soy sauce or liquid smoke)
recipeInstructions:
1. Squeeze excess moisture from thawed tofu; crumble in a frying pan.
2. Add water, Kitchen Bouquet, onion, garlic, salt and pepper, stirring to marinate tofu.
3. Simmer for 10 minutes on medium heat.
4. Drain the tofu and add barbecue sauce.
5. Simmer for another 10 minutes on low heat.
6. Serve on buns with extra sliced onions and sweet pickle relish.
